commentary_text: The model favors Uzbekistan at 46%, while sportsbooks and Polymarket collectively favor DR Congo at 46%. On the draw, the model assigns 30% probability versus the market's 26%—a 4-percentage-point gap favoring higher draw odds in the model. The largest divergence sits on Uzbekistan's win probability, where the model is 18 percentage points higher than the sportsbook consensus. This inversion of favorites might reflect market pricing that incorporates recent form, injuries, or lineup changes unavailable to the model's last training update. The dashboard surfaces these competing signals without adjudicating which captures ground truth.
